reviews: Walked in looking rough, walked out looking like a million bucks. These guys are artists.
Best fade in the city, hands down. Been coming here for three years and never been disappointed.
The vibe in here is incredible. Great music, cold drinks, and the most precise lineups I've ever gotten.
description: Eclectic Barbershop South Midtown is more than a barbershop — it's an experience. Our skilled barbers combine traditional techniques with modern styles to deliver precision cuts in a relaxed, welcoming atmosphere.
